notes.primary_metric: final-20% mean KL-to-own-final delta vs A_prime_raw
notes.specificity_margin: actual IT graft delta minus matched random residual-projection control delta
notes.prompt_level: Rows are first averaged over token steps within each prompt, then bootstrapped over prompts.
notes.dense_pool: Dense-5 pooled because this Exp19B run excluded DeepSeek by design.
